mapper.select:
SELECT emo.id, emo.order_no, emo.shipping_type FROM `eb_merchant_order` as emo LEFT JOIN `eb_order` as eo ON emo.order_no = eo.order_no
eo.is_del = 0 AND eo.is_user_del = 0 AND eo.is_merchant_del = 0 AND eo.paid = 1 AND eo.status != 9 AND emo.mer_id = #{merId}

SELECT IFNULL(SUM(emo.total_num),0) as total_num FROM `eb_merchant_order` as emo LEFT JOIN `eb_order` as eo ON emo.order_no = eo.order_no WHERE eo.is_del = 0 AND emo.mer_id = #{merId} AND date_format(eo.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') = #{date}
